project_context.company_name: GRUPO NOVEGA BIENES RAICES S.A DE C.V
project_context.target_audience: Medium-high purchasing power, investors, real estate agents

scales.label: text-xs tracking-[0.2em] uppercase text-[#D4AF37] font-sans font-medium

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Generous breathing room, bento grid structures, optical alignment over strict geometric alignment, and intentional asymmetry.

buttons.primary: bg-[#D4AF37] text-black font-medium py-3 px-8 hover:bg-[#C5A059] transition-all duration-300 font-sans tracking-wide flex items-center justify-center gap-2
buttons.outline: border border-[#D4AF37] text-[#D4AF37] font-medium py-3 px-8 hover:bg-[#D4AF37] hover:text-black transition-all duration-300 font-sans tracking-wide flex items-center justify-center gap-2

cards.service: bg-[#ffffff]/[0.03] border border-white/10 p-8 hover:bg-[#ffffff]/[0.05] hover:border-[#D4AF37]/50 transition-all duration-500 group flex flex-col
cards.property: group relative overflow-hidden bg-[#ffffff]/[0.02] border border-white/5 hover:border-white/20 transition-all duration-500
cards.job: border-b border-white/10 py-6 flex flex-col md:flex-row justify-between items-start md:items-center hover:bg-white/5 transition-colors px-4 -mx-4

header.style: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#0A0A0A]/70 border-b border-white/10 transition-all duration-300

components.hero_overlay: absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-t from-[#0A0A0A] via-[#0A0A0A]/40 to-[#0A0A0A]/10 z-10

interactions.hover: Subtle opacity and border color changes, text color highlights.
interactions.motion: Use smooth, restrained transitions. e.g., transition-all duration-500 ease-out.
interactions.image_zoom: On hover, property images scale up slightly: group-hover:scale-105 transition-transform duration-700 ease-out.

hero.description: Modern house exterior glowing at night. High contrast luxury.

about_team.description: Elegant business team representing the 5 partners.

landscape_context.description: Chiapas landscape (Sumidero canyon style) to root the company locally. Use as a subtle parallax or section background.

service_interior.description: Luxury modern interior for the Patrimonial Management section.

property_1.description: Elegant residential architecture illuminated at night.

property_2.description: Modern luxury house exterior lit up at night.

instructions_to_main_agent: Load Google Fonts in the root HTML or CSS: Cormorant Garamond and Outfit.
Implement a Dark Theme strictly as defined in color_palette. Do not use generic Shadcn gray/white default colors.
Bilingual toggle logic: Maintain a state (ES/EN) that swaps content JSONs or text maps. Header must contain the toggle (e.g., 'EN / ES' ghost button).
Add 'data-testid' to ALL interactive elements (e.g., data-testid='whatsapp-hero-cta', data-testid='lang-toggle-btn').

Hero Section: Full viewport height (min-h-screen). Absolute positioning for the hero image with the gradient overlay. H1 text-5xl to text-6xl, font-serif. Call-to-action must be prominently Gold, linking to WhatsApp.
Services Section: 3-column bento grid. Each card should display pricing transparently. Use lucide-react icons (e.g., Home, Briefcase, TrendingUp) with gold accent.
About Section: Asymmetric layout. Text on one side (col-span-12 md:col-span-5), team image on the other (col-span-12 md:col-span-7). High-end editorial feel.
Job Board Section: Use clean list items, not bulky cards. Show role 'Agente de Ventas Inmobiliarias'. Provide an 'Apply' outline button.

Contact & Footer: Create a form leveraging Shadcn UI components but heavily styled to match the dark luxury theme (transparent inputs with white bottom borders, no heavy white background). Include WhatsApp button in the footer.
Use Phosphor Icons or Lucide-React for crisp, elegant iconography. Maintain a 1px stroke for a refined look.
